bias_1_truncation.impact_direction: Long documents may lose key information after truncation, potentially lowering tier assessment

bias_2_section_names.impact_direction: doc_completeness systematically undercounts sections with non-standard naming

bias_3_domain_asymmetry.impact_direction: LLM may assess familiar domains more accurately; rare domains risk misclassification

bias_4_naming.impact_direction: Skills with research-related names may receive higher tiers due to name-based priming

bias_5_temperature.description: temperature=1.0 introduces randomness; same skill re-run may yield different tier. Not measurable with current single-run data.

category_A.label: 可直接使用 (Directly usable)
category_A.description: original entries with successful LLM audit, no inheritance, not in problematic groups

category_B.label: 需人工复核 (Needs human review)
category_B.description: canonical/variant with audit + successful fork_copy inheritance; boundary similarity cases

category_C.label: 不应依赖 (Should not rely on)
category_C.description: skipped/LLM-failed/inherited-failed entries, domain=unknown, problematic dedup groups

priorities.title: 修复 fork 继承 lookup bug
priorities.risk: 0 fork_copies got default tier=D/value=low due to lookup key mismatch
priorities.fix: Change canonical_lookup key to match by (duplicate_group, canonical_repo) correctly, handling multi-cluster union-find groups

priorities.title: 重审 LLM 失败条目
priorities.risk: 0 entries got default tier=D/value=low due to LLM JSON parse failures
priorities.fix: Add retry with backoff for failed entries; improve JSON extraction from LLM responses

priorities.title: 规范化 domain 分类
priorities.risk: 1408 entries with domain='unknown': 0 (see Q2 bias 3 for domain distribution)
priorities.fix: Create domain normalization mapping; merge near-duplicate domain names

priorities.title: 加入 Union-Find 后验校验
priorities.risk: Q1 found 0 potential false merges (0.0% of fork_copies)
priorities.fix: Add post-merge verification: re-check all pairs in each union-find cluster, split if below threshold
priorities.benefit: Reduce false merge rate from ~0.0% to near 0%

priorities.title: 增大截断限制 6000→12000 字符
priorities.risk: Long SKILL.md files lose information after 6000 chars; may cause under-rating
priorities.benefit: More accurate assessment for long documents
priorities.cost: low (constant change, slightly higher API cost)

priorities.title: 添加可信度评分到审计 prompt
priorities.risk: Current audit has no self-assessed confidence; all results treated equally
priorities.fix: Add confidence_score (1-5) to LLM prompt; use for downstream filtering
